text:
The local authority shall by 4.00pm on [date] file at court, serve on the parties, and send to the person assessed a special guardianship report.

[Name of other local authority] shall by 4.00pm on [date] prepare a special guardianship report in respect of [name] and file that report at court, serve it on the parties, and send a copy to the person assessed. The local authority may disclose the court bundle to [name of other local authority] for the purpose of preparing the report.

The local authority shall liaise with the persons assessed to ascertain if there is any information that the persons assessed seek to be redacted from the special guardianship report. If redactions are sought, the local authority must apply on notice to the other parties in sufficient time for the application to be determined before the date the report is due to be filed and served.

Termination of qualified legal representative

The appointment of [name] as qualified legal representative is terminated on [date] at [time].

Threshold findings

(include this recital at any hearing where the court makes threshold findings)

The court found threshold pursuant to s.31(2) Children Act 1989 proved in accordance with the findings in the schedule to this order.

(a schedule in this format, or a suitably adapted schedule to meet the needs of the particular case, should be appended to the order at any hearing at which findings are made)

Case No: [insert]

SCHEDULE OF FINDINGS MADE ON [DATE] BY [JUDGE]

(adapt this example schedule as appropriate to the case)

On [date] [name of judge] [handed down judgment] / [gave an oral judgment] / [accepted the proposed agreed threshold document] and made the following findings:

Threshold findings:

(insert threshold findings into this table, or if the court found threshold proved in accordance with the la schedule of allegation / threshold document and it is easier to do so, replace the table by copy and pasting as findings from that document into this schedule)

Transcript

[The local authority] [Name] shall by 4.00pm on [date] apply for a transcript of the [fact-finding] judgment given [today] / [on [date]] [together with the evidence given by [name] on [date]] [and such transcript must be expedited].

A transcript of the judgment is necessary:
